achievements.title: 猸?World Championships Triple Crown
achievements.description: Wang Liqin is known as the 'Forehand King', winning three World Championships men's singles titles (2001/2005/2007). Together with Wang Hao and Ma Lin, they formed the 'Two Wangs and One Ma' era. His forehand loop power and spin are considered historically elite. He was a core player of the Chinese men's team in the early 21st century.
